title: Demon Slayer Cosmetics
description: This project adds cosmetics such as Nichirins and headgear from the anime Demon Slayer.
body:
**Demon Slayer Cosmetics** brings various cosmetic items from the iconic anime series, Demon Slayer, to Minecraft. This pack works in Vanilla Minecraft, so no Optifine or other mods are required.

This pack aims to revisit the pack: Demon Slayer Katanas CIT [​OPTIFINE] 1.19 created by MichiMine. After contacting the original creator, I was granted permission to continue their work. To put it short, I decided to continue the original pack while incorporating some of my own creative decisions.

To obtain any of the katanas, rename **any sword** to one of the following:

- Axe Chain [Swords/Axes]
- Flail Chain [Swords/Mace]
- Giyu's Nichirin
- Genya's Nichirin
- Inosuke's Nichirin
- Kaigaku's Nichirin
- Kanae's Nichirin
- Kanao's Nichirin
- Kokushibo's Nichirin
- Kyojuro's Nichirin
- Mitsuri's Nichirin or Mitsuri's Nichirin+
- Muichiro's Nichirin
- Nichirin Blade
- Obanai's Nichirin
- Practice Nichirin or Practice Nichirin+ [Wooden Sword Only]
- Sanemi's Nichirin
- Sabito's Nichirin
- Sakonji's Nichirin
- Shinobu's Nichirin
- Tanjiro's Nichirin or Tanjiro's Nichirin+
- Tengen's Nichirin
- Zenitsu's Nichirin
- Genya's Shotgun [​Crossbow]
  
To Sheath the Nichirins, put them in your offhand. NOTE: This doesn't apply to Inosuke or Tengen's Nichirin

To obtain any of the Accessories, rename a **carved pumpkin** to one of the following:

- Aoi's Hairpin
- Bamboo Muzzle
- Boar Mask
- Furin Chime Hat
- Hanafuda Earrings
- Kanae's Hairpin
- Kanao's Hairpin
- Kaburamaru
- Nezuko's Horn
- Red Beads
- Shinobu's Hairpin
- White Fedora
- Nezuko's Box (Any Shulker Box)


**Terms of use**

Feel **FREE** to:
- Use this pack on your server.
- Alter the pack for personal use.
- Combine with other packs for personal use and play.
- Include the pack with modpacks with credit
- Use this pack in video content (Credit is highly appreciated).

You are **NOT** allowed to:
- Claim ownership over the textures/models in this pack.
- Reupload the entire resource pack elsewhere.
- Redistribute unedited individual assets from the pack without permission and credit.
- Redistribute edited assets from the pack without permission and credit.

I'm always open to feedback and suggestions, so if you feel inclined to share, please do.

I usually update this pack more frequently on Planet Minecraft under a similar name.
[DSC on Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/demon-slayer-cit-1-21-4-rebooted/)
